name: Tempe Storage Ottoman: Christopher Knight Home, No Assembly, Polyester Upholstery, Hardwood Frame - 18.5" Height
description: Enjoy this Christopher Knight Home Tempe Storage Ottoman in your home today. With its unique pattern, it is sure to be the topic of discussion, in a good way. Perfect for either a living room or office setting, or even a bed room, this ottoman boasts a decent amount of storage, ideal for those extra board games you have lying around, or those DVDs that you want easy access too, but don’t necessarily want to display. Great for anything that needs storing, this ottoman is the ideal storage solution.
